changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Post-Analysis Storage page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Select samples to assign to post-analysis storage. Choose aliquot type (isolate, DNA, primary sample), storage media (STGG, glycerol stock, bead system), container type, and storage conditions. Record environmental temperature logs twice daily.

column.name: content
column.value: {"description":"Store processed samples (isolates, DNA, primary samples) with appropriate storage conditions and environmental monitoring.","sections":[{"id":"sampleStorage","title":"Sample Storage","fields":[{"name":"aliquotType","type":"dropdown","label":"Aliquot Type","required":true,"options":["ISOLATE","DNA","RNA","PRIMARY_SAMPLE","GLYCEROL_STOCK","LYOPHILIZED"]},{"name":"storageMedia","type":"dropdown","label":"Storage Media","options":["STGG","GLYCEROL_15","GLYCEROL_20","BEAD_SYSTEM","AGAR_SLANT","BROTH_CULTURE","LYOPHILIZED","TE_BUFFER","RNASE_FREE_WATER","NONE"]},{"name":"containerType","type":"dropdown","label":"Container Type","options":["CRYOVIAL","TUBE_1_5ML","TUBE_2ML","SCREW_CAP_TUBE","AGAR_PLATE","AGAR_SLANT_TUBE","SLIDE","PCR_STRIP","OTHER"]},{"name":"storageMethod","type":"dropdown","label":"Storage Method","options":["FREEZER_MINUS20","FREEZER_MINUS80","REFRIGERATOR","SLIDE_CABINET","INCUBATOR","LIQUID_NITROGEN_TANK"]},{"name":"storageCondition","type":"dropdown","label":"Storage Condition","required":true,"options":["ROOM_TEMP","REFRIGERATED","FROZEN_MINUS20","FROZEN_MINUS80","LIQUID_NITROGEN"]},{"name":"organismIdentified","type":"text","label":"Organism Identified"},{"name":"storageBox","type":"text","label":"Storage Box"},{"name":"storageWell","type":"text","label":"Well Position"},{"name":"retentionYears","type":"number","label":"Retention Period (Years)","default":5}]},{"id":"volumeTracking","title":"Volume Tracking","fields":[{"name":"remainingVolume","type":"number","label":"Remaining Volume"},{"name":"volumeUnit","type":"dropdown","label":"Unit","options":["µL","mL"],"default":"µL"},{"name":"sampleStatus","type":"dropdown","label":"Sample Status","options":["ANALYZED","PARTIALLY_USED","EXHAUSTED","STORED_ISOLATE","STORED_DNA"]}]},{"id":"qualityFlags","title":"Quality Flags","fields":[{"name":"qualityFlags","type":"multiselect","label":"Quality Flags","options":["INSUFFICIENT_VOLUME","CONTAMINATION","MIXED_CULTURE","NO_GROWTH","ATYPICAL_MORPHOLOGY","VIABILITY_CONCERN","STORAGE_TEMP_DEVIATION","UNEXPECTED_RESULTS"]},{"name":"qualityNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Quality Notes"},{"name":"requiresInvestigation","type":"checkbox","label":"Requires Investigation"}]},{"id":"environmentalMonitoring","title":"Environmental Monitoring","description":"Temperature monitoring log - record twice daily or from automated systems","fields":[{"name":"temperatureLogDate","type":"date","label":"Date"},{"name":"temperatureLogTime","type":"time","label":"Time"},{"name":"temperature","type":"number","label":"Temperature"},{"name":"temperatureUnit","type":"dropdown","label":"Unit","options":["C","F"],"default":"C"},{"name":"storageLocationChecked","type":"text","label":"Storage Location"},{"name":"staffInitials","type":"text","label":"Staff Initials"},{"name":"monitoringNotes","type":"text","label":"Notes"}]}]}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_page_template WHERE id = 206

column.name: description
column.value: Store processed samples (isolates, DNA, primary samples) with appropriate storage conditions and environmental monitoring.

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select samples to assign to post-analysis storage. Choose aliquot type (isolate, DNA, primary sample), storage media (STGG, glycerol stock, bead system), container type, and storage conditions. Record environmental temperature logs twice daily.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Post-Analysis Storage - Manage aliquots, storage locations, and environmental monitoring
